_comment: Minimum pass thresholds for benchmark scenarios. Set conservatively below measured values to avoid fixture-drift flakiness while still catching regressions.

workspace_hygiene.description: Tokens saved by .antigravityignore excluding lock files and build outputs

context_slicing.description: Tokens saved by reading a 30-line slice vs the full 131KB react-dom bundle

caveman_mode.description: Output tokens saved by Caveman Mode compression across 3 prose response pairs

agents_md.description: Tokens saved over a 10-turn session by keeping AGENTS.md lean (<600 tokens)
